name: dgvoodoo-nowatermark
description: Disable the dgVoodoo2 on-screen logo through dgVoodoo.conf. The D3D8 wrapper is packed, so the safe path is config, not a binary watermark patch.

re.packed: The wrapper's high-entropy packed sections make a same-length static watermark byte patch unsafe. The rendered logo is not backed by a simple ASCII/UTF-16 string in the PE image.
re.confMechanism: dgVoodoo2 accepts a config whose Version/key structure matches the DLL build. For 2.87.2 the active Version is 0x287.

confChanges.note: Disables the D3D8/D3D9 bottom-right dgVoodoo watermark.
Glide is not the LOGH VII path, but keep this off too.
Prevents dgVoodoo Glide splash/logo paths if they are ever selected.
dgVoodoo documents 0/undefined as infinite duration if a watermark is enabled.

sharpBorderless.note: Aligned with ui_explorer and LOGH7Launcher. The older stretched/lanczos/AA remaster preset can blur LOGH VII's 2D UI and Korean text.

verify: Version=0x287; dgVoodooWatermark=false; 3DfxWatermark=false; 3DfxSplashScreen=false; WatermarkDisplayDuration=1; sharpBorderless=PASS; conf key-set structure preserved.
liveProof: .omo/ui-explorer/c002-latch-loop-98ca-20260628/shots/006-logo-recheck-live.png showed no bottom-right dgVoodoo logo on the previous canonical 98ca build. Current canonical 79142d12 uses the same no-watermark config path; visual recheck is still required for the new 16px/font-atlas stack.
